title: contact_query: inline error tuples bypass method_error helper; two patterns for same type
description: method_error(type) produces errors without descriptions. The two new position/limit checks use inline ('error'.to_string(), json\!({type,description})) because they need a description. This creates two patterns for invalidArguments errors: 6 call sites use method_error (no description) and 2 use inline construction (with description). A future contributor adding a new invalidArguments error will see method_error, use it, and silently drop the description. Fix: add fn invalid_args(description: &str) -> (String, Value) helper alongside method_error, and use it for the two position/limit sites.
close_reason: Added invalid_args() helper; replaced two inline error tuples in contact_query with it
